hero.tagline: Born for the roads. Bred for the wild.

overview.minides: Looks civilised, drives like it has unfinished business. The Scorpio N keeps the Scorpio attitude alive.
overview.description: The Mahindra Scorpio N is a ladder-frame body-on-frame SUV offering rugged capability combined with modern features. Available in 43 variants across 7 trim levels (Z2, Z4, Z6, Z8S, Z8, Z8T, Z8L), it offers petrol and diesel engines, manual and automatic gearboxes, and 4WD on select variants. The top Z8L gets Level-2 ADAS, Sony 12-speaker audio, panoramic sunroof, ventilated seats and AdrenoX connected tech.

suspension.front: Independent Double Wishbone with Coil Spring
suspension.rear: Multi-link Rigid Axle with Coil Springs
